zh.lifeSummary: 當Johann Daniel Runckel於大約1679年出生在德國海藍-普法爾茲藍德可萊斯 維德梅爾斯巴賀時，他的父親Werner Runckel28歲，母親Magdalena Schwenk26歲。他於1704年11月27日與Anna Maria Schenckelberg在海因里希_海普洛文次維德雷斯多福結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1715年10月10日在他的家鄉享年37歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Johann Daniel Runckel于大约1679年出生在德国海藍-普法爾茲藍德可萊斯 維德梅爾斯巴賀时，他的父亲Werner Runckel28岁，母亲Magdalena Schwenk26岁。他于1704年11月27日与Anna Maria Schenckelberg在海因里希_海普洛文次維德雷斯多福结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1715年10月10日在他的家乡享年37岁。

nameMeanings.name: Runckel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Dunkel
meanings: German: nickname from Middle Low German dunkel, a byform of dunker ‘dark, conceited, unclear’, also applied as a byname for a blind person. Compare Dunckel and Dunkle .

nameMeanings.name: Johann
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: John
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

nameMeanings.name: Daniel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name (meaning ‘God is my judge’ in Hebrew), borne by the prophet whose story is told in the Book of Daniel. He was an Israelite slave of the Assyrian king Nebuchadnezzar, who obtained great favour through his skill in interpreting dreams and the ‘writing on the wall’ at the feast held by Nebuchadnezzar's son Belshazzar. His enemies managed to get him cast into a lions' den, but he was saved by God. This was a favourite tale in the Middle Ages, often represented in miracle plays. The name has been perennially popular among English speakers since the 16th century and has been particularly favoured since the 1980s.

en.lifeSummary: When Johann Daniel Runckel was born about 1679, in Melsbach, Neuwied, Rhineland-Palatinate, Germany, his father, Werner Runckel, was 28 and his mother, Magdalena Schwenk, was 26. He married Anna Maria Schenckelberg on 27 November 1704, in Rengsdorf, Neuwied, Rhineland, Prussia. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 5 daughters. He died on 10 October 1715, in his hometown, at the age of 37.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Johann Daniel Runckel est né environ 1679, à Melsbach, Landkreis Neuwied, Rheinland-Pfalz, Allemagne, son père, Werner Runckel, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Magdalena Schwenk, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Anna Maria Schenckelberg le 27 novembre 1704, à Rengsdorf, Neuwied, Rhénanie, Prusse. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé le 10 octobre 1715, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 37 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Johann Daniel Runckel um 1679 in Melsbach, Landkreis Neuwied, Rheinland-Pfalz, Deutschland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Werner Runckel 28 und seine Mutter Magdalena Schwenk 26. Er hat am 27. November 1704 in Rengsdorf, Neuwied, Rheinprovinz, Preußen Anna Maria Schenckelberg geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb am 10. Oktober 1715 im Alter von 37 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Johann Daniel Runckel è nato il circa 1679 nel Melsbach, Landkreis Neuwied, Rheinland-Pfalz, Germania, il suo padre, Werner Runckel, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Magdalena Schwenk, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Anna Maria Schenckelberg il 27 novembre 1704, nel Rengsdorf, Neuwied, Rheinprovinz, Preußen. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 10 ottobre 1715, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 37 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Johann Daniel Runckelが約1679年にドイツルヘインランド-プファルズランドクレイス ネウウィエドメルスバチで生まれた時，父Werner Runckelは28歳，母Magdalena Schwenkは26歳であった。1704年11月27日にプレウssンルヘインプロヴィンズネウウィエドレングスドルフでAnna Maria Schenckelbergと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1715年10月10日に故郷で37歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Johann Daniel Runckel(이)가 대략 1679년 독일 리인랜드-p팔즈 랜드크레이스 니우위드 멜스바치에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Werner Runckel(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Magdalena Schwenk(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1704년 11월 27일 플레우ss 리인플로빈츠 니우위드 렌그즈도르프에서 Anna Maria Schenckelberg(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1715년 10월 10일 그의 고향에서 37세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Johann Daniel Runckel nasceu aproximadamente 1679, em Melsbach, Landkreis Neuwied, Rheinland-Pfalz, Alemanha, seu pai, Werner Runckel, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Magdalena Schwenk, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Anna Maria Schenckelberg em 27 de novembro de 1704, em Rengsdorf, Neuwied, Rheinprovinz, Preußen. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 10 de outubro de 1715, em sua cidade natal, com 37 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Johann Daniel Runckel родился около 1679 г. в местности мелсбач, ландкрис неувиед, раинланд-пфалз, Германия, его отцу по имени Werner Runckel было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Magdalena Schwenk, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Anna Maria Schenckelberg 27 ноября 1704 г. в местности ренгсдорф, неувиед, раинпровинз, Пруссия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 5 дочерей. Он умер 10 октября 1715 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 37 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Johann Daniel Runckel nació aproximadamente 1679, en Melsbach, Landkreis Neuwied, Rheinland-Pfalz, Alemania, su papá, Werner Runckel, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Magdalena Schwenk, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Anna Maria Schenckelberg el 27 de noviembre de 1704, en Rengsdorf, Neuwied, Rheinprovinz, Preußen. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 10 de octubre de 1715, en su pueblo, a la edad de 37 años.
